content:
好奇想問主線的癲狂，是計劃在什麼時候開放嗎?
~~一直鎖著沒開放是不是怕太難玩家打不過~~

No matter if you win the fight or forfeit, the result screen will always show a part of the boss stage on the top and bottom of the screen. I don’t know if this issue arises with every fight of 8-13 or if it’s only for the boss stage.

Extra rambling, you can ignore it if you don’t wanna deal with it lol:
Additionally, I got the achievement for killing the boss without Ramona’s help. Now, I had to use Emergency Gnosis to win the fight without Ramona’s help showing up in any of my tries. Not sure if it’s bugged since I only used 6 or 7 turns to kill the boss (I wouldn’t have survived more cus the stupid hp has to scale with your account level for some reason meaning my hp is too low to withstand shit since I’m a new player) so it’s possible that Ramona’s help only activates later in the fight, which would be weird cus then it would t help most of the players since most will just die after a few turns. Anyways, maybe it activates later and I was too fast but I’m not sure so I’m gonna mention it.

Also I bow to whoever worked on the visual and sound design of that boss, that was phenomenal. Would also be cool if you could watch such cutscenes back in the archive, but that aside, that cutscene was a masterpiece.
thread_title: 💭「Processing」[IOS][Visual bug] Result screen isn’t fullscreen after the endlos of chapter 8

content: 該畫面顯示了守密人的算力足夠打出追憶迴旋曲但追憶迴旋曲依舊維持紅框特效
thread_title: 💭「处理中」追憶迴旋曲的特效問題
